name: Gyrodyne, LLC
business: Gyrodyne, LLC manages a portfolio of medical office and industrial properties and pursues entitlements on such properties located in Suffolk and Westchester Counties, New York. The company's primary business is leasing space to tenants, including healthcare service providers and industrial users, under leases where tenants typically reimburse a portion of operating costs. Gyrodyne intends to dissolve after disposing of all real property assets and distributing proceeds to shareholders.
namedCustomers: Stony Brook University Hospital and affiliates
Major tenant in Cortlandt Manor Medical Center

exposures.sentence: Gyrodyne, LLC (including its subsidiaries, Gyrodyne , the Company or the Registrant ) is a limited liability company formed under the laws of the State of New York whose primary business is the management of a portfolio of medical office and industrial properties and the pursuit of entitlements on such properties located in Suffolk ( Flowerfield ) and Westchester ( Cortlandt Manor ) Counties, New York.

catalysts.sentence: Final Subdivision approval is expected in the third quarter 2026.

catalysts.event: Subdivision and site plan approval for Cortlandt Manor
catalysts.sentence: The Company believes, contingent on the timing for entering contracts (which we anticipate will include closing terms conditioned upon receiving site plan approval), the subdivision and site plan approval could be received in mid-2027.
